name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: At 4401 Liberty Ave in Pittsburgh, PA, Western Union Money Order Only offers 24-hour money order and check cashing services.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only at 4401 Liberty Ave in Pittsburgh, PA operates 24 hours daily, providing local residents with around-the-clock access to money order and check cashing services. This standalone Pittsburgh location sits on a busy commercial corridor, making it convenient for neighborhood residents and visitors needing urgent cash services. The storefront maintains extended hours to serve Pittsburgh's diverse financial needs at any time of day or night.

At this Pittsburgh branch on Liberty Ave, you can send domestic and international money orders, cash checks from various sources, and handle other quick financial transactions. Phone +1 412-621-4027 to confirm service availability or get help before you visit. The Western Union Money Order Only team at this Pittsburgh location can assist with rush orders and same-day transfers.

Pittsburgh residents who need 24-hour money order access can rely on this Liberty Ave location regardless of the day or time. Bring a government-issued photo ID and have the recipient information ready for any money orders you're sending. This Western Union Money Order Only branch offers fast processing and competitive rates for both local and long-distance transfers.
pros: Extensive network with 1,850+ agent locations embedded in Walmart, grocery chains, and retail partners across the US
No minimum balance or credit check required for prepaid card access
Money orders accepted as trusted alternative to checks and can be deposited into bank accounts
Online registration and app available to start transfers before visiting location, reducing counter wait time
Accepts cash, debit cards, and credit cards at select locations for payment flexibility
MTCN tracking system allows senders and recipients to confirm fund arrival
Reliable service with encryption and fraud prevention measures in place since 1851
First online international money transfer advertised as fee-free
cons: Service fees apply to all transfers; costs vary significantly by transfer method, payment option, and destination with no transparent fee schedule provided
In-person transactions require visiting physical locations during retailer-specific hours; not available online-only
No currency exchange services available in-person; international recipients subject to real-time exchange rates at time of transfer
Money orders must be purchased and cashed at participating locations only—limited to those offering the service
Prepaid card option requires separate application process and does not provide traditional bank account features
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without traditional bank accounts needing accessible cash services
International immigrants sending money to family abroad through convenient in-person locations
Consumers preferring to pay bills and send money in cash without using checks or banking online
Individuals needing money orders as check alternatives for secure payment transmission
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers and immigrants who need reliable in-person money transfer and bill payment services without a bank account. The main caveat is that all services require visiting physical locations during retailer hours, fees are non-transparent and vary widely by transfer type and destination, and the company is fundamentally a cash-based transaction facilitator rather than a banking alternative—making it more expensive than online or traditional banking for routine financial needs.
services: Utility, rent, and car payment bill payment
Western Union Prepaid Visa Card access
Online transfer registration with in-person cash payment completion
Bank partner services at select financial institutions
Retail location services at Walmart and grocery chains
Payment options: cash, debit card, and select credit card locations
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 4401 Liberty Ave, Pittsburgh, PA. 24-hour money orders and check cashing.
